sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: KB Home stock downgraded to sell by Seaport on job concerns
feed.summary: Seaport Global Securities downgraded KB Home (NYSE:KBH) stock to sell from buy, lowering its price target to $43 due to concerns over slowing housing activity and lower job growth impacting demand. The firm's bearish outlook is further supported by recent downward earnings revisions from other analysts and a decline in revenue. Despite KB Home being deemed undervalued by InvestingPro, the company recently reported lower-than-expected earnings and adjusted its full-year delivery guidance downwards, leading to a cautious stance among several research firms.

feed.title: Lineweaver Wealth Advisors Boosts Microsoft Holdings
feed.summary: Lineweaver Wealth Advisors LLC increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation by 10.1% in the fourth quarter of 2025, according to a recent SEC filing. The firm now owns 25,530 shares of Microsoft stock, valued at $12.35 million, making it their 14th largest holding. This move reflects Lineweaver's confidence in Microsoft's long-term growth prospects despite recent stock volatility.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Intercontinental Exchange to $205 From $200, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) to $205 from $200, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment suggests a positive outlook from UBS on the company's future performance.

feed.title: Ford recalls more than 400,000 trucks and SUVs because windshield wipers can fail
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. is recalling over 400,000 trucks and SUVs due to a defect where windshield wiper arms can fail, leading to reduced visibility and increased crash risk. The recall affects 2021-2023 Ford Expeditions, Lincoln Navigators, and various 2022-2023 F-Series Super Duty trucks. Owners will be notified, and dealerships will inspect and replace the wiper arms free of charge.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Bank of America Corp to $62 From $67, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has revised its price target for Bank of America Corp (BAC) down to $62 from $67, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes despite maintaining a positive outlook on the company. Investors should note this change in analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Goldman and Wells Fargo say buy tech stocks, it's rare for them to get this cheap
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and Wells Fargo are both advocating for buying technology stocks, citing that the recent market pullback has created an attractive entry point for investors. Despite a 7% year-to-date loss for S&P 500 Information Technology shares, driven by questions around AI spending, both firms believe valuations are now unusually cheap given strong fundamentals and double-digit earnings growth. Goldman highlights that the tech sector's valuation relative to expected growth has dipped below that of the broader global market, a rare occurrence.

feed.title: Insulet Corporation stock hits 52-week low at 199.53 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation's stock reached a new 52-week low of $199.53, despite strong fundamentals, recent impressive quarterly sales, and analysts revising earnings upwards. The company saw robust revenue growth and its stock is considered undervalued and oversold by InvestingPro. However, growing competition and a recent product recall have led several analysts to lower their price targets.

feed.title: Kirby Corp stock hits all-time high at 138.0 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kirby Corp's stock has reached an all-time high of $138.0, marking a 56.42% surge over the past year. Despite recent revenue falling short, the company reported strong Q4 2025 earnings and appointed Tracy A. Embree to its board. Evercore ISI reiterated an Outperform rating with a $138.00 price target, even amidst discussions of a potential U.S. Jones Act waiver that could impact the company.

feed.title: U.S. Bank becomes official NFL sponsor in multi-year deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: U.S. Bank has secured a multi-year partnership with the NFL, becoming an official bank and wealth management sponsor. This agreement includes presenting sponsorship of the Super Bowl MVP Award and involvement in the NFL FLAG Championships. The collaboration also features U.S. Bank providing financial education programming to NFL players.

feed.title: American Water to post Q1 results April 29, investor call follows
feed.summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced it will release its 2026 first-quarter financial results after market close on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. Following the release, the company will host a conference call and webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 9 a.m. Eastern Time, featuring executives John Griffith, David Bowler, and Cheryl Norton to discuss results and answer questions. The audio webcast, presentation slides, and a one-year replay will be available on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Roof installers get a screw built for standing seam panels
feed.summary: Teks, a brand of ITW Construction Products (NYSE: ITW), has launched the Teks Standing Seam Roofing Screw, specifically designed for attaching standing seam metal panels to wood decking and framing. This new fastener features a low-profile pancake head, T25 star drive, sharp point tip, and coarse threads, aiming to improve installation precision and efficiency. It is available nationwide at The Home Depot, Amazon, and participating suppliers.

feed.title: Entergy ties 2025 growth to 12,000 jobs and $77B in local investment
feed.summary: Entergy (NYSE: ETR) has released its 2025 Performance Report, highlighting significant growth, reliability enhancements, and extensive community investment. The report details 85 economic projects attracting over $77 billion in investments and creating more than 12,000 jobs, alongside achieving an adjusted EPS of $3.91. Entergy also invested $800 million in resilience projects and contributed $145 million in local economic impact.

feed.title: Duke Energy schedules May 5 earnings call with CEO Harry Sideris
feed.summary: Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. ET, followed by an earnings conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET. The call will be hosted by CEO Harry Sideris and CFO Brian Savoy and will provide business and financial updates. Investors can access the webcast and a recording on the company's investor relations page.

feed.title: AbbVie Gets JPMorgan Buying Opportunity Call With $260 Price Target Amid Competitive Concerns
feed.summary: JPMorgan views AbbVie's recent 12% stock pullback as a buying opportunity, reiterating an Overweight rating and a $260 price target. Despite competitive pressures and a significant R&D charge, the firm sees upside driven by strong growth in Skyrizi and Rinvoq, which now surpass Humira's peak sales. The analyst consensus remains bullish with 22 buy ratings, supported by AbbVie's immunology and neuroscience segment growth and a 3.18% dividend yield.

feed.title: CSX Downgraded to Neutral by Citigroup with Price Target Raised to $44 | CSX Stock News
feed.summary: Citigroup has downgraded CSX from a Buy to a Neutral rating, though its price target for CSX has been raised from $41.00 to $44.00. This adjustment implies a potential downside of 0.51% from its current price, according to Wall Street analysts, while GuruFocus estimates a 13.16% downside based on its GF Value. CSX, a Class I railroad operating in the Eastern US, generates significant revenue from diverse cargo types including coal, chemicals, and intermodal containers.

feed.title: Why Simon Property Group’s Record NOI Supports a $250 Price Target
feed.summary: Simon Property Group (SPG) recently underwent a significant leadership change following the death of its longtime CEO, David Simon, but the transition has been stable due to the appointment of Eli Simon as the new CEO. The company is experiencing record operational performance, with $4.8 billion in Real Estate FFO for FY2025 and an active redevelopment pipeline, contributing to an estimated 30.1% total return by December 2030 based on TIKR's valuation model. While Wall Street's mean target is $206.30, the street-high target of $250 is supported by the potential for accelerated NOI growth from its substantial development projects.

feed.title: Roper Stock Has Lost 38% From Its Highs: Is the Selloff a Buying Opportunity in 2026?
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) stock has fallen 38% from its 52-week high to $360.2 after Q4 2025 earnings guidance for 2026 disappointed Wall Street. Despite the sell-off, which was attributed to three underperforming businesses, Roper maintains strong free cash flow and significant capital deployment capacity, making it appear undervalued based on its forward P/FCF. The company's Q1 2026 earnings call will be a key indicator for whether organic growth can stabilize, particularly in the Application Software segment.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Increases Bag Fees as Fuel Prices Rise
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines announced an increase in checked bag fees for domestic and select short-haul international routes. This move is aimed at offsetting rising jet fuel costs, attributed to the Iran war. The price for the first and second checked bags will increase by $10 each, while the third checked bag will see a $50 increase.

feed.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Bank of America, JPMorgan Chase, Citigroup, Morgan Stanley and NVDIA
feed.summary: This Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights the potential for a market rally, driven by signs of oil supply relief, robust corporate fundamentals, and attractive tech valuations. The article discusses improved market breadth, positive EPS guidance from S&P 500 companies, and the decoupling of oil and equity prices. It also specifically mentions Bank of America, JPMorgan Chase, Citigroup, Morgan Stanley, and NVIDIA as key investment interests.

feed.title: CVS Stock Rises After CMS Medicare Advantage Update
feed.summary: CVS Health stock is up after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) announced an average 2.48% increase in Medicare Advantage payments for 2027, totaling over $13 billion. This update is significant for CVS due to its Aetna insurance unit and managed-care exposure, despite CMS maintaining the 2024 risk-adjustment model and excluding certain diagnoses from risk-score calculations. Investors are focusing on the funding boost ahead of the company's Q1 earnings report on May 6th, with analysts maintaining a bullish bias on the stock.

feed.title: Delta is the latest U.S. airline to increase baggage fees (DAL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has become the latest major airline to increase fees for checked bags on domestic and select short-haul international routes. This move by Delta aligns with the broader airline sector's efforts to offset rising jet fuel costs.

feed.title: Gilead Enters $5 Billion Agreement to Acquire Tubulis
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has announced an agreement to acquire Tubulis GmbH for up to $5 billion, significantly expanding its oncology pipeline with two clinical-stage antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) assets and a next-generation conjugation platform. This acquisition will establish Munich as Gilead's dedicated ADC research hub and builds on an existing collaboration between the two companies. The deal underscores Gilead's accelerated corporate buildout in oncology, positioning it more strongly in the competitive ADC landscape.

feed.title: Kroger kicks off Round Up at the Register for World Wildlife Fund
feed.summary: Kroger is launching a "Round Up at the Register" campaign for Earth Month, allowing customers to donate or round up their purchases to the nearest dollar to benefit the World Wildlife Fund (WWF). The Kroger Co. Zero Hunger | Zero Waste Foundation will match customer donations up to $50,000, supporting WWF's conservation and sustainability efforts. This initiative is part of Kroger's broader Zero Hunger | Zero Waste mission and builds on its decade-long partnership with WWF.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Keurig Dr Pepper Price Target to $32 From $36, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has adjusted its price target for Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) to $32, down from the previous $36, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst recent corporate activities, including Keurig Dr Pepper's acquisition of JDE Peet's. The article also notes other recent analyst and rating agency actions concerning Keurig Dr Pepper and JDE Peet's.

feed.title: RBC Capital reiterates Pfizer stock Underperform rating on product headwinds
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reaffirmed its "Underperform" rating and $25.00 price target for Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) due to mixed expectations for key products and a challenging start to 2026. The firm anticipates first-quarter 2026 revenues to be approximately 4% below consensus, largely influenced by competitive pressures on Vyndamax and Prevnar, and ongoing demand issues for Paxlovid. Upcoming catalysts include a Vyndamax bench trial on April 27 and Phase 3 data for sigvotatug vedotin in lung cancer during Q2 2026.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Exane Has Lowered Expectations for International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) Stock Price
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has reduced its price target for International Flavors & Fragrances (NYSE:IFF) from $88 to $85, while maintaining an "outperform" rating. This new target implies a potential 19.65% upside. The company recently missed quarterly EPS estimates but exceeded revenue expectations, and a director, Paul J. Fribourg, significantly increased his stake in the company.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley's new fintech banking head is from Banking's most nomadic team
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has appointed Georgi Balinov, formerly of Moelis and Silicon Valley Bank, as its global co-head of fintech investment banking. Balinov is part of a team known for its nomadic movement between firms, often following team leader Jason Auerbach. His appointment suggests Morgan Stanley may be preparing for growth in the fintech sector, with potential IPOs like Monzo on the horizon.

feed.title: Axon stock hits 52-week low at 396.41 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise Inc. (AXON) stock dropped to a 52-week low of 396.41 USD, a 55% plunge from its high, reflecting a 20.41% decrease over the past year and a 42% decline in six months. InvestingPro analysts suggest the stock is overvalued and highly volatile. Despite some analysts raising price targets due to strong bookings and revenue guidance, others have lowered targets citing broader software sector selloffs and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) PT Lowered to $58 at BofA Securities
feed.summary: BofA Securities analyst Ebrahim Poonawala has lowered the price target for Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) to $58. The article, published on April 7, 2026, is a premium-only piece providing details on this analyst rating change. To access the full content and other premium stock market news, users are required to sign in or upgrade to a StreetInsider.com Premium account.

feed.title: Textron Aviation Receives First Military Order for Cessna SkyCourier, Launching the Aircraft Into Global Defense Market
feed.summary: Textron Aviation Inc. announced that Belgium has ordered five Cessna SkyCourier aircraft for its Special Operations Forces, marking the aircraft's first military selection. This order will enhance Belgium's airlift capabilities with a rugged, multirole platform suitable for demanding missions, including troop transport, logistics, and medical evacuation. Deliveries are expected in 2027, followed by in-country military modifications by Sabena Engineering.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Halliburton to $39 From $35, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) to $39 from $35, while keeping a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook for the oil-related services company. Halliburton's stock was trading at $37.98, up 0.42%, as of 10:13:06 AM EDT on April 7, 2026.

feed.title: MSCI’s PM Insights deal adds data on private firms worth $5.5T
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. has acquired PM Insights, a specialist firm providing valuation and other data for private companies that represent over $5.5 trillion in equity market value. This acquisition aims to enhance transparency and provide institutional-grade data and analytics to private asset investing as companies increasingly remain private for extended periods. PM Insights collects proprietary data from a broad network of institutional broker-dealers and bank secondary desks, capturing secondary market activity and equity data crucial for understanding, monitoring, and valuing private equity investments.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Issues Pessimistic Forecast for KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) Stock Price
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group recently reduced its price target for KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) from $26.00 to $25.00 but maintained a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of over 21%. Despite the lowered target, analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $22.61. KeyCorp recently exceeded quarterly EPS estimates, with revenue showing a significant year-over-year increase, though insiders have sold a considerable number of shares in the past 90 days.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Price Target on Paychex to $94 From $95, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has adjusted its price target for Paychex (PAYX) from $95 to $94, while reiterating a "Hold" rating on the stock. This update reflects a minor revision in the analyst's valuation for the employment services provider. The news highlights recent analyst activities for Paychex from various firms, indicating a general re-evaluation of the company's financial outlook and stock performance.

feed.title: Why You Should Still Stay Out Of Alexandra Real Estate (NYSE:ARE)
feed.summary: The article advises investors to avoid Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) due to deteriorating fundamentals. ARE's planned asset sales are insufficient to offset construction spending and rising debt, pushing debt-to-EBITDA higher. The company also faces pressure on occupancy and rent spreads, along with plummeting property values and supply-demand imbalances in key markets, which could lead to a downgrade to junk status within 12-15 months.

feed.title: ING Ends Russian Unit Sale Amid Doubts On Buyer Approval
feed.summary: Dutch bank ING Groep NV has announced it will not proceed with the sale of its Russian subsidiary, ING Bank (Eurasia) JSC, to Global Development JSC. The decision was made due to an expectation that the Moscow-based buyer would not secure the necessary regulatory approvals for the acquisition. This marks the end of ING's efforts to divest its Russian unit.

feed.title: First Solar Price Target Cut by Jefferies as Logistics Inflation Threatens Near-Term Margins
feed.summary: Jefferies has lowered its price target for First Solar (FSLR) stock from $205 to $187, maintaining a "Hold" rating, citing concerns about rising logistics costs due to the Middle East conflict impacting near-term profit margins. This new target is below the current trading price of $193, highlighting analyst caution despite First Solar's domestic manufacturing advantages. The analyst firm believes logistics inflation, combined with pre-existing underutilization and production start-up costs, will significantly compress the company's margins in fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: What Is Driving Biogen’s Recent Drop and What Comes Next
feed.summary: Biogen (NASDAQ: BIIB) has experienced a significant stock drop since February 2026, falling from around $202 to $172, despite reporting strong Q4 2025 results. This decline is attributed to investor impatience with the company's transition from older, declining multiple sclerosis drugs to newer products like Leqembi and Skyclarys, which, though growing, are not yet fully offsetting the loss of legacy revenue. The company's recent $5.6 billion acquisition of Apellis Pharmaceuticals is a bold move to secure future growth and improve earnings by 2027, but adds short-term merger costs and financial noise, testing investor conviction during this transitional period.

feed.title: Cessna SkyCourier Strengthens Mission Versatility With New In‑Flight Operable Door Option
feed.summary: Textron Aviation Inc. announced a new In-Flight Operable Door option for the passenger variant of its Cessna SkyCourier turboprop, enhancing its versatility for special missions. This modification, expected in 2028, will allow for airborne deployment of personnel and cargo, expanding the aircraft's use in military, humanitarian, and commercial operations like skydiving and disaster relief. The door integrates with the SkyCourier's robust platform, known for performance and lower operating costs, and will maintain standard ground operations.

feed.title: Insulet Corporation stock hits 52-week low at 199.53 USD
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation's stock has hit a new 52-week low of $199.53, despite the company's strong fundamentals including a $14.3 billion market cap and 31% revenue growth. InvestingPro data suggests the stock is oversold and undervalued, with analysts revising earnings upwards. The decline comes amidst growing competition, recent price target cuts by analysts, a voluntary product recall, and a new executive appointment.

feed.title: Infosys, Harness partner to drive AI-led software delivery transformation
feed.summary: Infosys has announced a strategic collaboration with Harness, an AI software delivery platform, to accelerate AI-led software delivery transformation for enterprises globally. The partnership aims to integrate Infosys’ Topaz Fabric and Cobalt cloud capabilities with the Harness Software Delivery Platform to improve productivity, streamline processes, and reduce time-to-market. This collaboration addresses inefficiencies in software engineering by automating workflows from code to production with AI interventions, ensuring faster, more reliable, and governed delivery systems.

feed.title: Terre Haute to add $19M PFAS treatment system to drinking water
feed.summary: Indiana American Water is investing approximately $19 million to construct a second PFAS drinking water treatment facility in Terre Haute, with about $14 million covered by an Indiana State Revolving Fund loan. This project will utilize proven granular activated carbon technology, similar to a successful system in Charlestown, and is expected to break ground in summer 2026 with completion by mid-2028. The initiative aims to enhance water quality and public health by proactively addressing PFAS contamination.

feed.title: Barclays Maintains PPL Corp(PPL.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $41
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Michael Lonegan has reiterated a "Buy" rating for PPL Corp (PPL.US) and increased the target price from $40 to $41. According to TipRanks data, the analyst has a 67.9% success rate and an 8.4% average return over the past year. This information is intended for informational purposes only and not as investment advice.

feed.title: Competition Bureau reaches agreement with Welltower to protect competition in retirement home industry
feed.summary: The Competition Bureau has reached a consent agreement with Welltower OP LLC to address competition concerns regarding its proposed acquisition of 34 retirement home properties from Amica Senior Lifestyles in Canada. To resolve these concerns, Welltower has agreed to sell four of its existing retirement homes to independent purchasers. This agreement follows scrutiny of Welltower’s recent dominance in the UK care home market by the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA), which is investigating multiple acquisitions by Welltower Inc.

feed.title: Scotiabank Adjusts Price Target on Digital Realty Trust to $195 From $189, Maintains Sector Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Scotiabank has increased its price target for Digital Realty Trust (DLR) to $195 from $189, while reiterating its Sector Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the financial institution regarding the data center real estate investment trust. The article also briefly mentions other analyst adjustments for Digital Realty Trust from Wolfe, Barclays, and Raymond James, along with recent company activities such as acquisitions and executive changes.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Stock Rips on Medicare Win: Can It Break $300 Wall? - UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH)
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) stock surged after a favorable Medicare rate decision, leading to aggressive buying. The stock broke the $300 psychological barrier, but faces significant resistance between $300 and $400, a zone of prior breakdowns. Technical analysis suggests a potential grind rather than a swift recovery, with bulls banking on cost-cutting and AI efficiency, while bears worry about projected Medicare Advantage membership declines.

feed.title: Hidradenitis Suppurativa Pipeline 2026: MOA and ROA Insights, Clinical Trials Status, and Key Companies Involved by DelveInsight | InflaRx, Novartis, UCB, AbbVie, Pfizer, Amgen, Incyte Corp, CSL
feed.summary: The DelveInsight report highlights the significant progress in the Hidradenitis Suppurativa (HS) pipeline, with over 24 companies developing new therapies. Recent advancements include FDA approval for Novartis's Cosentyx for pediatric HS and promising late-stage clinical trial results for Incyte's povorcitinib and UCB's BIMZELX. The report also details various emerging drugs, their mechanisms, and routes of administration, while addressing market drivers and barriers.

feed.title: 11 million meals and 670,000 shelter nights: Northern Trust's 2025 impact
feed.summary: Northern Trust announced its 2025 philanthropic impact, detailing $16 million in charitable giving and 121,000 employee volunteer hours globally. The efforts focused on food security, affordable housing, quality education, and accessible healthcare, resulting in over 11 million meals provided and nearly 670,000 nights of safe shelter funded. The company emphasized its long-standing partnerships and employee engagement as key to creating lasting social impact.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE COLLEGE SAVINGS PLAN BECOMES "T. ROWE PRICE 529" TO REFLECT EXPANDED FLEXIBILITY FOR EDUCATION EXPENSES
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has renamed its "T. Rowe Price College Savings Plan" to "T. Rowe Price 529" to better reflect the broadened scope of educational expenses that tax-advantaged 529 accounts can now cover, including apprenticeships and student loan repayments. This change coincides with the plan's 25th anniversary, which T. Rowe Price and the Education Trust of Alaska are celebrating with a $250 matching incentive for new savers. The firm emphasizes the importance of early savings and the expanded flexibility of 529 plans in helping families prepare for future education costs.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Hartford Insurance Group to $153 From $151, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has raised its price target for Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) to $153 from $151, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the firm's continued positive outlook on the insurance company. The news follows other recent analyst adjustments for Hartford Insurance Group, with varied price targets and ratings.
